title: Fleur vs the Seagull
style: UGC comedy, no dialogue, ambient sound only

scenes.name: The Broodje
scenes.description: Fleur sitting at a sunny Dutch terrace, eating a broodje Hema worst. Visor on, relaxed, summer day. She takes a bite, happy.

scenes.name: The Snatch
scenes.description: A seagull swoops in and snatches the broodje Hema worst from her hands. Extreme VFX close-up of the seagull's face mid-grab — menacing, almost laughing.

scenes.name: Second Try
scenes.description: Fleur has a new broodje. Takes one bite. ANOTHER seagull takes it. She stares in disbelief, mouth open mid-bite, mustard on her lip.

scenes.name: The Trap
scenes.description: She builds a decoy broodje trap using a napkin and her sunglasses case. Places it carefully. Seagull takes the whole trap and flies off. Fleur slams the table.

scenes.name: Golf Club Warfare
scenes.description: Fleur grabs her golf club from her bag. Starts swinging at swooping seagulls like she's at the driving range. Slow-mo golf swing at a diving seagull. Epic sports-style shot.

scenes.name: The Army
scenes.description: VFX moment: an ARMY of seagulls appears on the rooftop. Dozens. All staring at her. Hitchcock-style. Dramatic zoom on Fleur's face — she knows she's outnumbered.

scenes.name: The Retreat
scenes.description: She runs inside the cafe, slams the glass door shut. Seagulls swarm the terrace outside. Chaos. Feathers everywhere. She watches from inside, breathing heavy.

scenes.name: The Punchline
scenes.description: Fleur sitting inside the cafe, menus taped over the windows. Eating her broodje Hema worst in peace. A single feather floats down from the ceiling vent. Pan to the terrace: Floris sitting outside completely unbothered, eating his broodje, seagulls ignoring him entirely.
